name: Daisy Days
description: Childlike kawaii storybook — a soft cream field, a candy pastel palette with a coral pop, chunky rounded Fredoka One display + a friendly Quicksand body, big rounded cards. Pastel stickers (daisy / star / cloud) and organic blobs.
descriptionZh: 童趣可爱绘本——柔和奶油底、糖果般粉彩配珊瑚色点缀、圆润 Fredoka One 标题 + 友好 Quicksand 正文、大圆角卡片。粉彩贴纸（雏菊/星星/云）与有机色块。
bestFor: Kids / education / friendly-brand / lighthearted topics — a warm playful storybook register.
